name: truffl
description: Truffl merchant dashboard and voice recovery automation platform.

scripts.build: pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter @truffl/api build && pnpm --filter @truffl/worker build && pnpm --filter @truffl/web build
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @truffl/core build && pnpm --filter @truffl/config build && pnpm --filter @truffl/connectors build && pnpm --filter @truffl/database build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @truffl/core typecheck && pnpm --filter @truffl/config typecheck && pnpm --filter @truffl/connectors typecheck && pnpm --filter @truffl/database typecheck && pnpm --filter @truffl/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @truffl/worker typecheck && pnpm --filter @truffl/web typecheck
